raw_input: Write an elevator pitch (50–80 words) for a startup that offers same-day in-home diagnostic blood testing for pet owners, staffed by mobile veterinary phlebotomists. Target audience is a time-constrained pet owner who currently dreads vet visits. Avoid jargon. Be concrete about the offer and the benefit. No filler openings.
success_criteria: addresses a time-constrained pet owner benefit
constraints: no markdown headers or bullet lists
